description: Style Note In the past, looking good meant compromising on your comfort, but now, jockey briefs for women aims to change all that. jockey uses a variety of extra comfy and stretchy fabrics to create the most fashionable women's underwear styles. You can be sure that when you wear panties from Jockey, you're choosing all-day comfort. Now, looking good can be comfortable too! Product Details Boy leg shorts Fit fabulously just below the waistline Modern low rise styling with modest leg coverage Fashionable ultra soft logo elastic that leaves no marks on your skin Available in irresistible colours to compliment you Material and Care Cotton/elastane Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
